HomeDestinationsKalimpong
West Bengal

Kalimpong

The Hill Station of Golden Pastures

Warm morning light filtering through pine forests, echoing church bells and Himalayan freshness.

4.6
(245 reviews)
Kalimpong, West Bengal
mountainsnatureculturetrekking
21°C
Partly Cloudy
Explore

Overview

Introduction

Kalimpong is a serene hill station nestled in the eastern Himalayas, known for its panoramic views of the Kanchenjunga, rich colonial heritage, vibrant Buddhist monasteries, and the famous flower market.

History

Once a part of the kingdom of Sikkim, Kalimpong became an important trading post between India and Tibet. The British developed it as a sanatorium and hill station in the 19th century.

Altitude

1,247 m

Best Time

October to May

Temperature

Summer: 15-25°C | Winter: 2-10°C

Location

Kalimpong, West Bengal

Weather

Pleasant throughout the year

Summer

15-25°C

Winter

2-10°C

Monsoon

18-22°C

Gallery

Nearby Attractions

Religious

Durpin Monastery

One of the largest monasteries in the region with panoramic views.

Viewpoint

Deolo Hill

Highest point in Kalimpong offering 360-degree views.

Heritage

Morgan House

Colonial-era heritage property with scenic gardens.

KuboVista

Dr. Graham's Homes

A beautiful school campus with Scottish architecture.

Why visit: Peaceful walks and historical significance

Pine View Nursery

Famous for its cactus collection and exotic plants.

Why visit: Unique botanical experience

Viewpoints

panoramic

Deolo Hill Viewpoint

Highest point with panoramic Himalayan views.

sunrise

Sunrise Point

Best spot to witness the golden sunrise over Kanchenjunga.

Local Cuisine

Must-Try Dishes

MomosThukpaAloo DumSel RotiChhurpi Soup

Restaurants

Gompas Restaurant

4.3

Tibetan & Chinese • ₹300-600

Cozy place with authentic momos and thukpa.

Art Cafe

4.5

Continental & Indian • ₹400-800

Beautiful garden cafe with artistic ambiance.

Cafes

Himalayan Java Coffee

4.6

Specialty: Organic Coffee

Best coffee in town with mountain views.

The Bake House

4.4

Specialty: Pastries & Hot Chocolate

Freshly baked goodies in a warm setting.

Street Food

Momo Stall at Main Market

Freshly steamed and fried momos with spicy chutney

Thukpa Corner

Hot noodle soup with local vegetables and meat

Shopping

Kalimpong Haat

Local market for handicrafts and woolens.

Handwoven shawlsTibetan artifactsOrganic tea

Culture & Festivals

Culture

Rich Himalayan culture with Buddhist monasteries and Nepali traditions.

LosarBuddha JayantiDashainTihar

Adventure Activities

Paragliding

Moderate

Soar over the hills with stunning aerial views.

30 mins
₹3,000

Trekking to Samthar

Easy

Scenic trek through tea gardens and villages.

1 day
₹1,500

Suggested Itineraries

Activities

  • • Deolo Hill sunrise
  • • Durpin Monastery
  • • Morgan House
  • • Local market
Breakfast at cafe, Lunch at local restaurant, Evening tea
Local taxi
Budget hotel/homestay
₹2,000

How to Reach

train

Nearest railway station is New Jalpaiguri (NJP)

~3 hrs drive
₹150-500

flight

Nearest airport is Bagdogra (IXB)

~2.5 hrs drive
₹3,000-8,000

bus

Direct buses from Siliguri and Darjeeling

~3-4 hrs
₹200-400

car

Private taxis and shared jeeps available

~2.5 hrs
₹2,500-4,000

Nearby Railway

New Jalpaiguri Junction (NJP) - 72 km

Nearby Airport

Bagdogra Airport (IXB) - 78 km

Taxi Fare

Shared: ₹150-200, Private: ₹2,500-3,500

Bike Rental

₹500-800/day (Royal Enfield/Scooty)

October to May offers clear skies and pleasant weather.
